# License Scope: GitHub Infrastructure

## Purpose

This directory contains repository automation and continuous-integration
configuration.

## Ownership and intended license

QArcade-authored workflow configuration in this directory is intended to be
covered by the root `LICENSE-CODE` (Apache-2.0), subject to final contributor
ownership review.

Referenced GitHub Actions and other external services remain under their own
terms. This scope does not relicense them.

## Contributions

Contributions must be original or properly licensed, must preserve third-party
notices, and are submitted under Apache-2.0 when accepted into this directory.
